case_title: MENENDEZ TERESA VS RIVAS RIC DBA MISSION PAGING COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $367.85 FILED BY MENENDEZ TERESA AS TO DEFENDANT RIVAS RIC DBA MISSION PAGING COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENENDEZ TERESA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVAS RIC DBA MISSION PAGING COMPANY $86.30 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $125.30, PLFT TO RETURN PAGER CURRENTLY IN HER POSSESSION TO DEFT. DEFT TO RETAIN (KEEP) PAGER WHICH HE NOW STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RIVAS RIC DBA MISSION PAGING COMPANY
